ab: ulra ku lralrang temakesi i Hagi, marayas malalup mada za eman ziya.
ch: 我有一個同學叫Hagi，他常常忘記帶東西。
en: I have a classmate named Hagi, he often forgets to bring things.

ab: nu temakakesi mi mu, mukuwa kivelasa kana tu lralrang za impic, aivas zi maw na vavalrayan.
ch: 上課的時候，他跟同學借鉛筆、橡皮擦或是筆記本。
en: During class, he borrowed pencils, erasers or notebooks from his classmates.

ab: nu parasan, nu repuwan, nu patelun mu ta pavelasay ziya.
ch: 一次、兩次、三次，大家會借東西給他。
en: Once, twice, three times, everyone would lend him something.

ab: maw mu ulra tu kakuwayanan a kuwatreng, marayas kivelas zi ’azi palaawli’.
ch: 但是他有個壞習慣，經常借了東西卻不還。
en: But he has a bad habit of often borrowing things but not returning them.

ab: likuzan lra mu ata lra muwai pavelas kanintaw.
ch: 最後大家都不想借他東西了。
en: In the end, no one wanted to borrow anything from him.

ab: ulra saya wari, salrangalrangan mi mukuwa kivangavanga.
ch: 有一天，我們大家一起去郊遊。
en: One day, we all went on an outing together.

ab: kazu mi ziya i dadalan mu, i Hagi mu maranger mukuwa i tavunan, maw mu malalup mada za ’a’ilu.
ch: 路途中，Hagi想上廁所，但他忘記帶衛生紙。
en: On the way, Hagi wanted to go to the bathroom, but he forgot to bring toilet paper.

ab: kivulas za ’a’ilu kanatu lralrang, maw mu nantu lralrang papiya mu temuvang kanintaw marengay, ’azi ku mada wa karkuwakuwa.
ch: 他跟同學借衛生紙，可是大家都回他說，我也沒有帶耶。
en: He borrowed toilet paper from his classmates, but everyone told him that I didn’t bring them either.

ab: i Hagi mu matrangis zatu aleduwan. ’ilremes zi mararengay, mazu inmu papiya ’azi mu muwai pavelas za ’a’ilu kaninku!
ch: Hagi急的哭了出來。他生氣的說，為什麼大家都不借我衛生紙!!
en: Hagi burst into tears. He said angrily, why don’t everyone lend me toilet paper!

ab: nantu lralrang marengay kanintaw, maw izu na ’azi u muwai mada zi, nu kivelas u mu ’azi u palaawli’!
ch: 同學告訴他，因為你都不自己帶，而且借給你的東西，你都不會還!
en: The classmate told him, because you didn’t bring it yourself, and you wouldn’t return the things lent to you!

ab: a ’emanamanan mukuwa mi lra i kungkuwan mu, i Hagi mu semavalr kazu lra i kungkuwan. i Hagi mu nantu kinivelas ziya kanantu lralrang na eman ziya mu tu palawli’aw peniya kanantu lralrang.
ch: 隔天上學，Hagi很早就到學校了，Hagi把跟同學借的東西都還給同學們。
en: The next day at school, Hagi arrived at school early and returned everything he had borrowed from his classmates.

ab: i Hagi semungal kanantu lralrang zatu pinamelriyan, zi marengay, aada ku lra za eman ziya zi lrayuan kemaya ku kananku lralrang aziyu ziya mu nu kivelas ku mu wai mu pavelas kaninku.
ch: Hagi向同學們道歉，並說他以後一定會自己帶東西，也謝謝同學們之前願意借他東西。
en: Hagi apologized to the students and said that he would definitely bring his own things in the future, and thanked the classmates for their willingness to lend him things before.
